2604.14475.title: Evo-MedAgent: Beyond One-Shot Diagnosis with Agents That Remember, Reflect, and Improve
2604.14475.paper_summary: Tool-augmented large language model (LLM) agents can orchestrate specialist classifiers, segmentation models, and visual question-answering modules to interpret chest X-rays. However, these agents still solve each case in isolation: they fail to accumulate experience across cases, correct recurrent reasoning mistakes, or adapt their tool-use behavior without expensive reinforcement learning. While a radiologist naturally improves with every case, current agents remain static. In this work, we propose Evo-MedAgent, a self-evolving memory module that equips a medical agent with the capacity for inter-case learning at test time. Our memory comprises three complementary stores: (1)~\emph{Retrospective Clinical Episodes} that retrieve problem-solving experiences from similar past cases, (2)~an \emph{Adaptive Procedural Heuristics} bank curating priority-tagged diagnostic rules that evolves via reflection, much like a physician refining their internal criteria, and (3)~a \emph{Tool Reliability Controller} that tracks per-tool trustworthiness. On ChestAgentBench, Evo-MedAgent raises multiple-choice question (MCQ) accuracy from 0.68 to 0.79 on GPT-5-mini, and from 0.76 to 0.87 on Gemini-3 Flash. With a strong base model, evolving memory improves performance more effectively than orchestrating external tools on qualitative diagnostic tasks. Because Evo-MedAgent requires no training, its per-case overhead is bounded by one additional retrieval pass and a single reflection call, making it deployable on top of any frozen model.
2604.14475.paper_summary_zh: 工具增強的大型語言模型（LLM）代理可以協調專家分類器、分割模型和視覺問答模塊來解讀胸部X光片。<lb/>然而，這些代理仍然是孤立地解決每個案例：它們無法在案例之間積累經驗、糾正重複的推理錯誤，或在沒有昂貴的強化學習的情況下調整其工具使用行為。<lb/>雖然放射科醫生在每個案例中自然會有所進步，但目前的代理仍然保持靜態。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了Evo-MedAgent，一個自我演化的記憶模塊，賦予醫療代理在測試時進行跨案例學習的能力。<lb/>我們的記憶包含三個互補的存儲區： (1)~\emph{回顧性臨床案例}，從類似的過去案例中檢索問題解決經驗， (2)~一個\emph{自適應程序啟發式}庫，策劃優先標記的診斷規則，通過反思進行演變，就像醫生精煉其內部標準一樣， (3)~一個\emph{工具可靠性控制器}，跟踪每個工具的可信度。<lb/>在ChestAgentBench上，Evo-MedAgent將多選題（MCQ）準確率從0.68提高到0.79，在GPT-5-mini上，並從0.76提高到0.87，在Gemini-3 Flash上。<lb/>憑藉強大的基礎模型，演變記憶在質性診斷任務上的性能提升效果優於協調外部工具。<lb/>因為Evo-MedAgent不需要訓練，其每個案例的開銷僅限於一次額外的檢索和一次反思調用，使其可以在任何凍結模型之上部署。
2604.14475.author: Weixiang Shen et.al.
2604.14475.authors: Weixiang Shen, Bailiang Jian, Jun Li, Che Liu, Johannes Moll, Xiaobin Hu, Daniel Rueckert, Hongwei Bran Li, Jiazhen Pan
